spoilers.title: [#ONEPIECE1182] IF THIS POST HERE NOT PROOF ENOUGH DRAGON WILL BE THE RAIN GOD, FOR PEOPLE I JUST DONT KNOW!! So killingham mention of Zaza being connected to chanting a rhythm/dance in hints & spoile
spoilers.text: [#ONEPIECE1182] IF THIS POST HERE NOT PROOF ENOUGH DRAGON WILL BE THE RAIN GOD, FOR PEOPLE I JUST DONT KNOW!! So killingham mention of Zaza being connected to chanting a rhythm/dance in hints & spoilers. I have discover their was Rock band from New Zealand started in 70s called DRAGON!!! and not just that yall, THEIR HIT SONG WAS 1983 SONG CALLED “RAIN”!!!! But it don’t stop there yall, it was another rock band started in 1987 called “ZAZA”!!!! The band leader was guitarist named NEIL ZAZA & 1998 he made Song called “RAIN”!! This is all the proof point to Monkey D Dragon being the rain god Zaza & we all know ODA is a big music head.

misc.title: #ONEPIECE1182 Loki may have shrunk himself. He mentions that he is "too big" in his normal form; it is possible that he has reduced his size. Consequently, Ragnir appears significantly larger (assumin
misc.text: #ONEPIECE1182 Loki may have shrunk himself. He mentions that he is "too big" in his normal form; it is possible that he has reduced his size. Consequently, Ragnir appears significantly larger (assuming this isn't simply an inconsistency on Oda's part).
